title: Wrong function result in Tikv
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR, c3 DATE, PRIMARY KEY(c1));
INSERT INTO t2(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01'), (2, NULL, '2023-01-02'), (3, 'example', NULL);
SELECT COUNT(c1) FROM t2 WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(c1) FROM t2 WHERE c3 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Different COUNT results from tikv and tiflash queries
